title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Vamos a utilizar el dataset de carros de vega_dataset https://vega.github.io/vega-datasets/


Code
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
import pandas as pd

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Tooltip


Code
cars = data.cars()
cars['URL'] = "https://google.com/search?q="+cars['Name']
cars.head()

#paso1
brush = alt.selection_interval(resolve='intersect')
#paso3
condition = alt.condition(
    brush,
    'Origin',
    alt.value('lightgray')
)

opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    brush,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.3)
)

autos = alt.Chart(cars).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X("Horsepower"),
    alt.Y("Miles_per_Gallon"),
    color = condition,
    # opacity = opacity_condition,
    href='URL',
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip('Name',title='Nombre: ')
    ]
).add_params(brush) #paso2

# autos.save("autos.html")

autos_link = autos.encode(
    alt.X('Acceleration'),
    alt.Y('Weight_in_lbs')
)


autos | autos_link


/var/folders/p8/tdnhgpds2mq070npwb96q3ym0000gn/T/ipykernel_79820/1909135793.py:39: UserWarning: Automatically deduplicated selection parameter with identical configuration. If you want independent parameters, explicitly name them differently (e.g., name='param1', name='param2'). See https://github.com/vega/altair/issues/3891
  autos | autos_link

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Bind legend


Code
click_legend = alt.selection_point(fields=['Origin'],bind='legend')
points_opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    click_legend,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.3)
)

points = alt.Chart(cars).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('Horsepower'),
    alt.Y('Miles_per_Gallon'),
    alt.Color('Origin'),
    opacity = points_opacity_condition
).add_params(click_legend)

points

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Selección de 2 gráficos diferentes


Code
# BARRAS

click = alt.selection_point(fields=['Origin'])
bar_opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    click,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.3)
)

bars = alt.Chart(cars).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y('Origin'),
    alt.Color('Origin'),
    opacity = bar_opacity_condition,
    tooltip=[
        'count()'
    ]
).add_params(click)

bars

#POINTS

points_opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    click,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.3)
)

points = alt.Chart(cars).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('Horsepower'),
    alt.Y('Miles_per_Gallon'),
    alt.Color('Origin'),
    opacity = points_opacity_condition
)

points & bars

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Transform filter


Code
brush = alt.selection_interval()
points_opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    brush,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.3)
)

points = alt.Chart(cars).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('Horsepower'),
    alt.Y('Miles_per_Gallon'),
    alt.Color('Origin'),
    opacity = points_opacity_condition
).add_params(brush)

points

bar_chart_max = cars.groupby('Origin').size().max()
bars = alt.Chart(cars).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()', scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0,bar_chart_max])),
    alt.Y('Origin'),
    alt.Color('Origin'),
    tooltip=[
        'count()'
    ]
).transform_filter(brush)

points & bars









Leyenda en varios gráficos


Code
click_legend = alt.selection_point(fields=['Origin'],bind='legend')

points_opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    click_legend,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.3)
)

points = alt.Chart(cars).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('Horsepower'),
    alt.Y('Miles_per_Gallon'),
    alt.Color('Origin'),
    opacity = points_opacity_condition
).add_params(click_legend)

bars_opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    click_legend,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.3)
)

bars = alt.Chart(cars).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y('Origin'),
    alt.Color('Origin'),
    opacity = bars_opacity_condition,
    tooltip=[
        'count()'
    ]
)

points & bars

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Slider


Code
worldwide_gross_max = movies['Worldwide_Gross'].max()

slider_gross = alt.binding_range(
    name='Worldwide Gross: ',
    min=0,
    max=worldwide_gross_max,
    step=10e6
)

select_worldwige_gross = alt.selection_point(
    fields = ['Worldwide_Gross'],
    bind=slider_gross
)

opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    # select_tomatoes_rating,
    alt.datum.Worldwide_Gross > select_worldwige_gross.Worldwide_Gross,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.1)
)

points = alt.Chart(movies).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating'),
    alt.Y('IMDB_Rating'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    opacity=opacity_condition,
    tooltip=['Title','Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating','IMDB_Rating','Major_Genre']
).add_params(select_worldwige_gross).interactive()

points

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Overview + details


Code
brush = alt.selection_interval()
opacity_condition = alt.condition(
    brush,
    alt.value(1),
    alt.value(0.2)
)

bars_slider = alt.Chart(movies).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('Release_Date'),
    alt.Y('count()'),
    opacity = opacity_condition
).properties(
    height = 50
).add_params(brush)


points = alt.Chart(movies).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating'),
    alt.Y('IMDB_Rating'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    opacity=opacity_condition,
    tooltip=['Title','Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating','IMDB_Rating','Major_Genre','Release_Date']
).add_params(brush)


points & bars_slider


/var/folders/p8/tdnhgpds2mq070npwb96q3ym0000gn/T/ipykernel_79820/4091028901.py:26: UserWarning: Automatically deduplicated selection parameter with identical configuration. If you want independent parameters, explicitly name them differently (e.g., name='param1', name='param2'). See https://github.com/vega/altair/issues/3891
  points & bars_slider

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Minimap - Release Date


Code
select_date = alt.selection_interval()

base = alt.Chart(movies).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    alt.X('Release_Date'),
    alt.Y('mean(Worldwide_Gross)')
).properties(
    width=500
)

# base


##details
upper_chart = base.encode(
    alt.X('Release_Date', scale=alt.Scale(domain=select_date))
).properties(height=180)

lower_chart = base.add_params(select_date).properties(height=50)

upper_chart & lower_chart

title: Visualización Hola Mundo

Movies from vega

movies_cleaned = data.movies()
movies_cleaned.head()
movies_cleaned.info()

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Line chart


Code
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line().encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)')
).interactive()

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Trail


Code
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_trail().encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('sum(US_Gross)'),
    alt.Size('sum(Production_Budget)')
).interactive()

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Suma acumulada


Code
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_line().transform_window(
    sort=[{'field':'Release_Date'}],
    cumulative_us_gross = 'sum(US_Gross)'
).encode(
    alt.X('Release_Date'),
    alt.Y('cumulative_us_gross:Q')
)

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Area


Code
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    interpolate='basis',
    color='lightblue',
    line=True
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('mean(US_Gross)')
).properties(
    width=600
)










Code
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    interpolate='basis',
    color=alt.Gradient(
      gradient='linear',
      stops=[
        alt.GradientStop(color='white',offset=0),
        alt.GradientStop(color='darkgreen',offset=1)
      ],
      x1=1,
      x2=1,
      y1=1,
      y2=0
    ),
    line=True
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('mean(US_Gross)')
).properties(
    width=600
)

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Highlight


Code
hightlight = alt.selection_point(
    on='mouseover', fields=['Major_Genre'], clear='mouseout'
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    interpolate='basis',
    line=True
    # point=alt.OverlayMarkDef(filled=False, fill='white')
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('mean(US_Gross)'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    opacity = alt.condition(hightlight,alt.value(1),alt.value(0.1))
).add_params(hightlight).properties(width=600).interactive()

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Small multiples


Code
hightlight = alt.selection_point(
    on='mouseover', fields=['Major_Genre'], clear='mouseout'
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    interpolate='basis',
    line=True
    # point=alt.OverlayMarkDef(filled=False, fill='white')
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('mean(US_Gross)', title=None),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    row=alt.Row('Major_Genre'),
    opacity = alt.condition(hightlight,alt.value(1),alt.value(0.1)),
    tooltip=[
        'Major_Genre'
    ]
).add_params(hightlight).properties(
    width=600,
    height=30
).interactive()

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Streamgraph


Code
hightlight = alt.selection_point(
    on='mouseover', fields=['Major_Genre'], clear='mouseout'
)

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_area(
    interpolate='basis',
    line=True
    # point=alt.OverlayMarkDef(filled=False, fill='white')
).encode(
    alt.X('year(Release_Date)'),
    alt.Y('mean(US_Gross)',stack='center', axis=None),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    opacity = alt.condition(hightlight,alt.value(1),alt.value(0.1))
).add_params(hightlight).properties(width=600).interactive()

title: Visualización Hola Mundo
text:
Temporal heatmap


Code
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('date(Release_Date):O'),
    alt.Y('month(Release_Date):O'),
    alt.Color('sum(US_Gross)'),
    tooltip=['sum(US_Gross)']
)

title: Visualizando Distribuciones
text:
Code
import altair as alt
import pandas as pd
from vega_datasets import data

title: Visualizando Distribuciones
text:
Rugplot


Code
alt.Chart(movies).mark_tick().encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)

title: Visualizando Distribuciones
text:
Histograma


Code
alt.Chart(movies).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('runtime', bin=alt.Bin(step=10)),
    alt.Y('count()')
)

title: Visualizando Distribuciones
text:
Gráfico de densidad o KDE


Code
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    as_ = ['runtime','density']
).mark_area().encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q')
)










Code
alt.Chart(movies).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    groupby=['genre'],
    as_ = ['runtime','density'],
    steps=100
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack=None),
    alt.Color('genre')
)










Code
density = alt.Chart(movies[:10]).transform_density(
    'runtime',
    as_ = ['runtime','density']
).mark_area(opacity=0.5).encode(
    alt.X('runtime:Q'),
    alt.Y('density:Q', stack=None)
)


tick = alt.Chart(movies[:10]).mark_tick(
    color='black',
    yOffset=140
).encode(
    alt.X('runtime')
)

density + tick

title: Visualizando Distribuciones
text:
Boxplot - caja y bigotes


Code
bar = alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('mean(Worldwide_Gross)'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre')
)

blox = alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_boxplot().encode(
    alt.X('Worldwide_Gross'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    alt.Size('count()')
)

blox | bar

title: Visualizando Distribuciones
text:
Heatmap


Code
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('IMDB_Rating', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=60)),
    alt.Y('Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=60)),
    alt.Color('count()')
)

title: Visualizando Distribuciones
text:
Facetas


Code
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y('MPAA_Rating'),
    alt.Color('MPAA_Rating'),
    tooltip=[
        'count()'
    ]
).properties(
    width=90,
    height=70
).facet(
    'Major_Genre',
    columns=4,
)










Code
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre'),
    alt.Color('Major_Genre'),
    tooltip=[
        'count()'
    ]
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=130
).facet(
    'MPAA_Rating',
    columns=4,
)










Code
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('MPAA_Rating'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre', sort='color'),
    alt.Color('count()'),
    tooltip=['count()']
)










Code
alt.Chart(movies_extended).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X('MPAA_Rating'),
    alt.Y('Major_Genre', sort='color'),
    alt.Color('count()'),
    alt.Size('count()'),
    tooltip=['count()']
)

title: Exploratory Analysis Data
text:
Code
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
Code
movies_extended = data.movies()
movies_extended.info()


<class 'pandas.DataFrame'>
RangeIndex: 3201 entries, 0 to 3200
Data columns (total 16 columns):
 #   Column                  Non-Null Count  Dtype  
---  ------                  --------------  -----  
 0   Title                   3200 non-null   object 
 1   US_Gross                3194 non-null   float64
 2   Worldwide_Gross         3194 non-null   float64
 3   US_DVD_Sales            564 non-null    float64
 4   Production_Budget       3200 non-null   float64
 5   Release_Date            3201 non-null   str    
 6   MPAA_Rating             2596 non-null   str    
 7   Running_Time_min        1209 non-null   float64
 8   Distributor             2969 non-null   str    
 9   Source                  2836 non-null   str    
 10  Major_Genre             2926 non-null   str    
 11  Creative_Type           2755 non-null   str    
 12  Director                1870 non-null   str    
 13  Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating  2321 non-null   float64
 14  IMDB_Rating             2988 non-null   float64
 15  IMDB_Votes              2988 non-null   float64
dtypes: float64(8), object(1), str(7)
memory usage: 400.3+ KB

title: Exploratory Analysis Data
section: Distribución de todas las columnas númericas
text:
Distribución de todas las columnas númericas


Code
numerical_columns = movies_cleaned.select_dtypes('number').columns.tolist()
#[ 'US_Gross', 'Worldwide_Gross', 'Production_Budget', 'Running_Time_min','Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating','IMDB_Rating','IMDB_Votes']

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat(),type='quantitative',bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Y('count()')
).properties(
    width=150,
    height=150
).repeat(
    numerical_columns,
    columns=4
)










Code
numerical_filtered = ['IMDB_Rating', 'Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating', 'US_Gross', 'Production_Budget']

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'), type='quantitative'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='quantitative')
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=100
).repeat(
    column=numerical_filtered,
    row=numerical_filtered
)










Code
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'), type='quantitative', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='quantitative', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Color('count()')
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=100
).repeat(
    column=numerical_filtered,
    row=numerical_filtered
).resolve_scale(
    color='independent'
)

corr_df = corr_df[corr_df['Variable1'] <= corr_df['Variable2']]

heatmap_corr = alt.Chart(corr_df).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('Variable1'),
    alt.Y('Variable2'),
    alt.Color('Correlacion', scale=alt.Scale(domain=[-1,1],scheme='redblue'))
).properties(
    width=300,
    height=300
)

text_corr = heatmap_corr.mark_text().encode(
    alt.Text('Correlacion', format='.2f'),
    color=alt.condition(
        'abs(datum.Correlacion) > 0.5',
        alt.value('white'),
        alt.value('black')
    )
)

(heatmap_corr + text_corr).configure_view(
    strokeWidth=0
)
